note: Submodule of photoswipe. It adds a caption third-party setting to the PhotoSwipe field formatters, a caption-source resolver, and a global settings config object, and needs an external caption JS library. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded); no site mutation.

evals.prompt: I want captions to appear inside the PhotoSwipe lightbox on my Drupal 11 site. Which module do I enable, and what does it depend on?
evals.expected_output: Enable the PhotoSwipe Dynamic Caption submodule (photoswipe_dynamic_caption), which depends on the main photoswipe module.

evals.prompt: After enabling PhotoSwipe Dynamic Caption, where do I pick what text is used as the lightbox caption, and what are the built-in source options?
evals.expected_output: In the field formatter's third-party settings on Manage display, the 'Photoswipe image caption' select: image title, image alt, entity label, media entity name, another field, or custom (tokens).

evals.prompt: I want to build the PhotoSwipe caption from a custom token pattern. Which caption option do I choose, and what module enables the token browser?
evals.expected_output: Choose the 'Custom (with tokens)' caption option and fill the custom textarea; installing the Token module adds a token browser.

evals.prompt: The status report says the PhotoSwipe dynamic caption plugin library is missing. How do I install it?
evals.expected_output: Provide the library: composer require npm-asset/photoswipe-dynamic-caption-plugin:^1.2 into /libraries/photoswipe-dynamic-caption-plugin, or enable the CDN option on the main PhotoSwipe settings form.

evals.prompt: Which config object and setting controls whether PhotoSwipe captions are placed automatically, below, or aside the image, and what is the settings route?
evals.expected_output: The options.type key (auto/below/aside) on the photoswipe_dynamic_caption.settings config object, edited at /admin/config/media/photoswipe_dynamic_caption (route photoswipe_dynamic_caption.settings).

evals.prompt: Why does the PhotoSwipe caption setting not show up when I configure the Photoswipe formatter for an image field inside a View?
evals.expected_output: It is a Drupal core limitation (issue 2686145): formatter third-party settings are missing from the Views UI; you must patch core until it is fixed.
